cfg.enabled.name: Enabled
cfg.enabled.desc: Master switch. When on, the entire vanilla GameBalance is dumped to BepInEx/plugins/GameBalanceDumper/dump/ on game start.
cfg.pretty_print.name: Pretty Print
cfg.pretty_print.desc: On: indent the JSON for readability. Off: minified single-line output (smaller files, faster to write).
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
